item.text: I’m going to scan the workspace for every `ToolCallRequested` / `ToolCallResult` occurrence, then inspect each hit to separate true construction sites from pattern matches. I’ll only use `rg`, `ls`, `find`, and focused `sed -n` reads so every claim is tool-verified.
I found candidate hits, and next I’m validating all `ToolCallRequested`/`ToolCallResult` mentions under `crates/` so we don’t miss constructors that use different formatting.

I confirmed `agent_loop.rs` has explicit `sink.emit(&LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... })` and `ToolCallResult { ... }` constructions. I’m now checking the other hit files to ensure they’re only matches/usages and should be excluded.

## Construct sites
